title: Vanity Street
writer: Frank Cavett, Edwards Roberts, Gertrude Purcell
actors: Charles Bickford, Helen Chandler, Mayo Methot
plot: A NYC police-detective rescues a down-and-out showgirl from a bad situation, gets her a job in the 'Follies", and falls in love with her. Then, as he is about to lead her to the altar, he has to arrest her for a murder she did not...
